description_long: This is a thick, hardbound book with a dark, nearly black cover and metallic-looking page edges, giving it a formal and durable appearance. The cover is plain except for the title text, which is centered and printed in a clear, bold font. Two thin ribbon bookmarks, one white and one gray, extend from the bottom of the book, suggesting it is designed for frequent reference. The book's spine features simple horizontal lines and the title text, maintaining a minimalist and classic design. The edges of the pages have a slightly reflective, silvery finish, adding to the book's distinguished look. There are no visible illustrations or publisher logos on the cover or spine.
description: A thick, hardbound book with a dark cover, metallic page edges, and two ribbon bookmarks. The design is formal and minimal, with only title text visible.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the side, showing the metallic page edges and two ribbon bookmarks extending from the bottom.
description_view_1: The book is viewed from the top, displaying the plain dark cover with centered title text and a single ribbon bookmark visible at the edge.
description_view_2: The opposite side view highlights the metallic page edges and the absence of visible bookmarks on this side.
description_view_3: The spine is visible, featuring horizontal lines and the title text, with the ribbon bookmarks extending from the back.
attribute_title_text: NEW WORLD TRANSLATION OF THE HOLY SCRIPTURES
attribute_spine_design: The spine is black with simple horizontal lines and the title text printed in a clear, upright orientation. There are no decorative elements or illustrations.
